revision.comment: body.skin-minerva was shortened to .skin-minerva as redundant/overqualified. If that is true, this edit will make no difference. But my testing suggests it is not unnecessary, and this should fix the noted at the talk page.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was 1 revision imported: trying to get the ambox in
